expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both focus areas: it has sections titled “Missing scenario generation — template-save” (mapping to BCIN-7669) and “Missing scenario generation — report-builder loading” (mapping to BCIN-7727), and states: “This directly matches the benchmark focus ‘missing scenario generation for report-builder loading.’”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md begins with “Primary phase under test: phase4a” and grounds its assessment in the phase4a contract: “Per the Phase 4a contract… must include… template-save… builder-loading… (Reference: skill_snapshot/references/phase4a-contract.md)”. execution_notes.md also states: “Primary phase under test is phase4a… result intentionally stays at the phase4a level.”
